title: Fluo-3-AM Assay
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"40t4o","text":"determine the intracellular Ca2+ concentration of your cells via a fluorescence marker","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: dilute the DMSO stock solution (1-5mM) to 1-5μM in the buffered physiological medium of choice
Pluronic F-127 may be added to a concentration of 0.02 % volume
incubate an aliquot of the cells with Fluo-3-AM for 01:00:00 at 20 °C - 37 °C
wash the cells in indicator-free medium and incubate the cells for another 00:30:00 in dye-free medium
mix in an aliquot of Fluo-3-AM stock solution to a concentration of 4 micromolar (µM)
measure fluorescence at Ex/Em = 506/526 with a microplate reader
creator: uebl
